# ProtoBufferParser - Examples and Test Cases

## 개요

이 문서는 ProtoBufferParser의 입력(.proto)과 출력(.h/.cpp)의 실제 예제를 보여줍니다.

---

## 예제 1: 기본 타입 (Basic Types)

### 입력: player.proto
```protobuf
syntax = "proto3";

message Player {
    int32 id = 1;
    string name = 2;
    float health = 3;
    bool is_active = 4;
}
```

### 출력: MEPlayerProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from player.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MEPlayerProto.generated.h"

// Forward declaration
namespace proto { class Player; }

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FPlayerProto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    FPlayerProto() = default;
    
    // Marshal from protobuf message (protoc로 생성된 C++ 클래스)
    explicit FPlayerProto(const proto::Player& proto);

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 Id;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    FString Name;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    float Health;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    bool IsActive;
};
```

### 출력: MEPlayerProto.cpp
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from player.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#include "MEPlayerProto.h"
#include "player.pb.h"  // protoc로 생성된 헤더

FPlayerProto::FPlayerProto(const proto::Player& proto)
{
    Id = proto.id();
    Name = FString(UTF8_TO_TCHAR(proto.name().c_str()));
    Health = proto.health();
    IsActive = proto.is_active();
}
```

### 사용 예제
```cpp
// protoc로 생성된 C++ 클래스 사용
#include "player.pb.h"
#include "MEPlayerProto.h"

// 네트워크에서 Protocol Buffer 객체 수신
proto::Player Player = ReceiveFromNetwork();

// Unreal 구조체로 변환
FPlayerProto Proto(Player);

// Unreal Engine에서 사용
UE_LOG(LogTemp, Log, TEXT("Player: %s (HP: %.1f)"), *Proto.Name, Proto.Health);
```

---

## 예제 2: Enum

### 입력: status.proto
```protobuf
syntax = "proto3";

enum PlayerStatus {
    UNKNOWN = 0;
    ONLINE = 1;
    OFFLINE = 2;
    AWAY = 3;
}

message Player {
    int32 id = 1;
    string name = 2;
    PlayerStatus status = 3;
}
```

### 출력: MEPlayerStatusProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from status.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MEPlayerStatusProto.generated.h"

UENUM(BlueprintType)
enum class EPlayerStatusProto : uint8
{
    Unknown = 0 UMETA(DisplayName = "Unknown"),
    Online = 1 UMETA(DisplayName = "Online"),
    Offline = 2 UMETA(DisplayName = "Offline"),
    Away = 3 UMETA(DisplayName = "Away")
};
```

### 출력: MEPlayerStatusProto.cpp
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from status.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#include "MEPlayerStatusProto.h"

// Enum implementation
```

### 출력: MEPlayerProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from status.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MEPlayerStatusProto.h"
#include "MEPlayerProto.generated.h"

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FPlayerProto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 Id;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    FString Name;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    EPlayerStatusProto Status;
};
```

---

## 예제 3: Repeated Fields (배열)

### 입력: inventory.proto
```protobuf
syntax = "proto3";

message Inventory {
    int32 owner_id = 1;
    repeated int32 item_ids = 2;
    repeated string item_names = 3;
    repeated float item_weights = 4;
}
```

### 출력: MEInventoryProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from inventory.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MEInventoryProto.generated.h"

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FInventoryProto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 OwnerId;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    TArray<int32> ItemIds;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    TArray<FString> ItemNames;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    TArray<float> ItemWeights;
};
```

---

## 예제 4: Map Fields

### 입력: config.proto
```protobuf
syntax = "proto3";

message GameConfig {
    map<string, int32> settings = 1;
    map<int32, string> player_names = 2;
    map<string, float> damage_multipliers = 3;
}
```

### 출력: MEGameConfigProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from config.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MEGameConfigProto.generated.h"

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FGameConfigProto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    TMap<FString, int32> Settings;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    TMap<int32, FString> PlayerNames;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    TMap<FString, float> DamageMultipliers;
};
```

---

## 예제 5: 중첩 메시지 (Nested Messages)

### 입력: character.proto
```protobuf
syntax = "proto3";

message Character {
    int32 id = 1;
    string name = 2;
    
    message Equipment {
        int32 weapon_id = 1;
        int32 armor_id = 2;
        
        message Weapon {
            int32 id = 1;
            string name = 2;
            float damage = 3;
        }
        
        Weapon weapon = 3;
    }
    
    Equipment equipment = 3;
}
```

### 출력: MECharacter_Equipment_WeaponProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from character.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MECharacter_Equipment_WeaponProto.generated.h"

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FCharacter_Equipment_WeaponProto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 Id;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    FString Name;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    float Damage;
};
```

### 출력: MECharacter_EquipmentProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from character.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MECharacter_Equipment_WeaponProto.h"
#include "MECharacter_EquipmentProto.generated.h"

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FCharacter_EquipmentProto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 WeaponId;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 ArmorId;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    FCharacter_Equipment_WeaponProto Weapon;
};
```

### 출력: MECharacterProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from character.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MECharacter_EquipmentProto.h"
#include "MECharacterProto.generated.h"

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FCharacterProto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 Id;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    FString Name;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    FCharacter_EquipmentProto Equipment;
};
```

## 예제 6: Import 의존성

### 입력: common.proto
```protobuf
syntax = "proto3";

message Vector3 {
    float x = 1;
    float y = 2;
    float z = 3;
}

message Quaternion {
    float x = 1;
    float y = 2;
    float z = 3;
    float w = 4;
}
```

### 입력: transform.proto
```protobuf
syntax = "proto3";

import "common.proto";

message Transform {
    Vector3 position = 1;
    Quaternion rotation = 2;
    Vector3 scale = 3;
}
```

### 출력: MEVector3Proto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from common.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MEVector3Proto.generated.h"

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FVector3Proto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    float X;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    float Y;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    float Z;
};
```

### 출력: MEQuaternionProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from common.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MEQuaternionProto.generated.h"

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FQuaternionProto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    float X;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    float Y;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    float Z;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    float W;
};
```

### 출력: METransformProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from transform.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MEVector3Proto.h"       // Import 의존성
#include "MEQuaternionProto.h"    // Import 의존성
#include "METransformProto.generated.h"

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FTransformProto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    FVector3Proto Position;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    FQuaternionProto Rotation;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    FVector3Proto Scale;
};
```

---

## 예제 7: 복합 예제 (게임 데이터)

### 입력: game_data.proto
```protobuf
syntax = "proto3";

enum ItemType {
    ITEM_UNKNOWN = 0;
    ITEM_WEAPON = 1;
    ITEM_ARMOR = 2;
    ITEM_CONSUMABLE = 3;
}

enum Rarity {
    COMMON = 0;
    UNCOMMON = 1;
    RARE = 2;
    EPIC = 3;
    LEGENDARY = 4;
}

message Item {
    int32 id = 1;
    string name = 2;
    ItemType type = 3;
    Rarity rarity = 4;
    int32 level = 5;
    map<string, int32> stats = 6;
}

message Player {
    int32 id = 1;
    string username = 2;
    int32 level = 3;
    float experience = 4;
    repeated Item inventory = 5;
    map<int32, int32> quest_progress = 6;
    
    message Stats {
        int32 strength = 1;
        int32 agility = 2;
        int32 intelligence = 3;
        float health = 4;
        float mana = 5;
    }
    
    Stats stats = 7;
}

message Guild {
    int32 id = 1;
    string name = 2;
    repeated Player members = 3;
    int32 level = 4;
}
```

### 출력 파일 목록
```
MEItemTypeProto.h / .cpp
MERarityProto.h / .cpp
MEItemProto.h / .cpp
MEPlayer_StatsProto.h / .cpp
MEPlayerProto.h / .cpp
MEGuildProto.h / .cpp
```

### 출력: MEItemTypeProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from game_data.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MEItemTypeProto.generated.h"

UENUM(BlueprintType)
enum class EItemTypeProto : uint8
{
    ItemUnknown = 0 UMETA(DisplayName = "ItemUnknown"),
    ItemWeapon = 1 UMETA(DisplayName = "ItemWeapon"),
    ItemArmor = 2 UMETA(DisplayName = "ItemArmor"),
    ItemConsumable = 3 UMETA(DisplayName = "ItemConsumable")
};
```

### 출력: MERarityProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from game_data.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MERarityProto.generated.h"

UENUM(BlueprintType)
enum class ERarityProto : uint8
{
    Common = 0 UMETA(DisplayName = "Common"),
    Uncommon = 1 UMETA(DisplayName = "Uncommon"),
    Rare = 2 UMETA(DisplayName = "Rare"),
    Epic = 3 UMETA(DisplayName = "Epic"),
    Legendary = 4 UMETA(DisplayName = "Legendary")
};
```

### 출력: MEItemProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from game_data.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MEItemTypeProto.h"
#include "MERarityProto.h"
#include "MEItemProto.generated.h"

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FItemProto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 Id;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    FString Name;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    EItemTypeProto Type;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    ERarityProto Rarity;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 Level;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    TMap<FString, int32> Stats;
};
```

### 출력: MEPlayer_StatsProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from game_data.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MEPlayer_StatsProto.generated.h"

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FPlayer_StatsProto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 Strength;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 Agility;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 Intelligence;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    float Health;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    float Mana;
};
```

### 출력: MEPlayerProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from game_data.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MEItemProto.h"
#include "MEPlayer_StatsProto.h"
#include "MEPlayerProto.generated.h"

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FPlayerProto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 Id;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    FString Username;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 Level;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    float Experience;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    TArray<FItemProto> Inventory;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    TMap<int32, int32> QuestProgress;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    FPlayer_StatsProto Stats;
};
```

### 출력: MEGuildProto.h
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------
// AUTO-GENERATED from game_data.proto
// DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten
// Generated by ProtoBufferParser
// ----------------------------------------------

#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
#include "MEPlayerProto.h"
#include "MEGuildProto.generated.h"

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct FGuildProto
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 Id;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    FString Name;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    TArray<FPlayerProto> Members;

    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Proto")
    int32 Level;
};
```

---

## 예제 8: CLI 사용법

### 기본 사용
```bash
# 단일 폴더 변환
ProtoBufferParser --input-dir ./ProtoFiles --output-dir ./Generated

# 또는 짧은 형식
ProtoBufferParser -i ./ProtoFiles -o ./Generated
```

### Import 경로 지정
```bash
ProtoBufferParser -i ./ProtoFiles -o ./Generated -I ./CommonProtos -I ./ThirdParty
```

### 상세 로그 출력
```bash
ProtoBufferParser -i ./ProtoFiles -o ./Generated --verbose
```

### 전체 옵션 사용
```bash
ProtoBufferParser \
  --input-dir ./ProtoFiles \
  --output-dir ./Generated \
  --import-paths ./CommonProtos \
  --import-paths ./ThirdParty \
  --property-spec EditAnywhere \
  --verbose
```

### 실행 출력 예제
```
[INFO] ProtoBufferParser starting...
[INFO] Input: ./ProtoFiles
[INFO] Output: ./Generated
[INFO] Scanning for .proto files...
[INFO] Found 3 .proto files
[INFO] Compiling player.proto...
[INFO] Compiling inventory.proto...
[INFO] Compiling guild.proto...
[INFO] Writing 8 generated files...
[INFO] Done!
```

---

## 예제 9: 에러 케이스

### Proto2 문법 사용 (에러)
```protobuf
syntax = "proto2";

message Player {
    required int32 id = 1;  // Proto2 키워드
    optional string name = 2;
}
```

**출력:**
```
[ERROR] player.proto(4,5): error PC006: Unsupported Proto2 syntax detected
Proto3 syntax is required. Use 'syntax = "proto3";'
```

### 순환 의존성 (에러)
```protobuf
// a.proto
import "b.proto";
message A {
    B b = 1;
}

// b.proto
import "a.proto";
message B {
    A a = 1;
}
```

**출력:**
```
[ERROR] Circular dependency detected: a.proto -> b.proto -> a.proto
```

### 중복 필드 번호 (에러)
```protobuf
syntax = "proto3";

message Player {
    int32 id = 1;
    string name = 1;  // 중복!
}
```

**출력:**
```
[ERROR] player.proto(5,18): error PC002: Duplicate field number 1 in message 'Player'
```

---

## 예제 10: 대규모 프로젝트 구조

### 프로젝트 구조
```
MyGame/
├── ProtoFiles/
│   ├── common/
│   │   ├── types.proto
│   │   └── math.proto
│   ├── gameplay/
│   │   ├── player.proto
│   │   ├── inventory.proto
│   │   └── quest.proto
│   └── network/
│       ├── packets.proto
│       └── session.proto
└── Generated/
    ├── METypesProto.h / .cpp
    ├── MEMathProto.h / .cpp
    ├── MEPlayerProto.h / .cpp
    ├── MEInventoryProto.h / .cpp
    ├── MEQuestProto.h / .cpp
    ├── MEPacketsProto.h / .cpp
    └── MESessionProto.h / .cpp
```

### 컴파일 명령
```bash
ProtoBufferParser \
  -i ./MyGame/ProtoFiles \
  -o ./MyGame/Generated \
  -I ./MyGame/ProtoFiles/common \
  --verbose
```

---

## 테스트 케이스 체크리스트

### 기본 기능
- [ ] 모든 기본 타입 (int32, string, bool 등)
- [ ] Enum 정의
- [ ] Message 정의
- [ ] Repeated 필드
- [ ] Map 필드

### 중첩 구조
- [ ] 1단계 중첩 메시지
- [ ] 2단계 이상 중첩 메시지
- [ ] 중첩 Enum
- [ ] 중첩 메시지 + Enum 혼합

### 의존성
- [ ] 단일 Import
- [ ] 다중 Import
- [ ] Import 체인 (A → B → C)
- [ ] 순환 의존성 검출

### 네이밍
- [ ] snake_case 변환
- [ ] camelCase 변환
- [ ] UPPER_CASE 변환
- [ ] 숫자 포함 이름
- [ ] 특수문자 처리

### 에러 처리
- [ ] Proto2 문법 검출
- [ ] 문법 오류 검출
- [ ] 중복 필드 번호 검출
- [ ] 존재하지 않는 Import 파일

### Edge Cases
- [ ] 빈 메시지
- [ ] 필드가 없는 Enum (최소 1개 필요)
- [ ] Reserved 필드/번호
- [ ] 긴 이름 (100자+)
- [ ] 특수문자가 포함된 주석

---

**상태**: 완료
